creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Startup Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. Its new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.
contentSnippet: Startup Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. Its new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.
contentSnippet: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

title: (No AI) Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
author: Richard Lawler
content:
![Image of the chocolate factory from Netflix’s reality show with a chocolate river and various tubes.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/videoframe_9748.png?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

A [new teaser trailer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oTSvnmTfLj8) confirmed that [_Wonka's The Golden Ticket_](https://www.netflix.com/tudum/articles/the-golden-ticket-season-1-release-date-news) will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its [_Squid Game_ reality show](https://www.theverge.com/23971416/squid-game-the-challenge-review-netflix) in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some [Glasgow-style AI fakes](https://www.theverge.com/2024/2/27/24084945/what-do-you-get-from-ads-made-with-ai-someone-calls-the-cops-and-you-make-children-cry), the voiceover is AI-generated.

[_Deadline_](https://deadline.com/2026/06/netflix-gene-wilder-voice-ai-premiere-date-golden-ticket-1236970711/) reports that Netflix worked with AI audio company [ElevenLabs](https://www.theverge.com/news/818470/elevenlabs-iconic-voice-marketplace-ai-audio) with consent from Wilder's family, after working on productions re-creating the voice of Michael Caine and Stan Lee. It also [continues Netflix's 2021 partnership](https://www.theverge.com/22688734/netflix-roald-dahl-deal-kids-programming-competition-disney-plus) with the Roald Dahl company, and is separate from the _Charlie vs. the Chocolat …_

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/streaming/959684/netflix-wonka-golden-ticket-gene-wilder)
contentSnippet:
A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. 
Deadline reports that Netflix worked with AI audio company ElevenLabs with consent from Wilder's family, after working on productions re-creating the voice of Michael Caine and Stan Lee. It also continues Netflix's 2021 partnership with the Roald Dahl company, and is separate from the Charlie vs. the Chocolat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. Deadline […]

title: (No AI) Libby will filter out AI content, kind of
author: Janko Roettgers
content:
![Crying in H Mart in the Libby app](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/chorus/uploads/chorus_asset/file/24148705/PXL_20221028_153245856.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

_This is_ [Lowpass _by Janko Roettgers_](https://www.lowpass.cc/)_, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for_ The Verge _subscribers once a week._

"AI is the new frontier for us," says Marc DeBevoise, who took over as the new CEO of [OverDrive](https://company.overdrive.com/) last week. OverDrive is best known for the ebook lending app [Libby](https://libbyapp.com/) that is available through tens of thousands of public libraries. Like the rest of the digital publishing industry, it's poised to face massive disruption from a huge wave of AI-generated books.

To prepare for the AI onslaught, Libby is now getting ready to introduce AI content controls, allowing readers to select in t …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/column/959433/libby-ai-filter)

title: (No AI) How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
content: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
contentSnippet: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

title: (No AI) Introducing GeneBench-Pro
content: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

creator: Katie Drummond
title: (No AI) Bernie Sanders Saw This Coming
dc:creator: Katie Drummond
content: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.
contentSnippet: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.

creator: Dhruv Mehrotra, Joel Khalili
title: (No AI) Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
dc:creator: Dhruv Mehrotra, Joel Khalili
content: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.
contentSnippet: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.
